ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Index fields in frontmatter only or in the whole note (if you use dataview inline fields). Indexing full notes could cause some latencies in vaults with large files
ast.target: 仅索引前置信息中的字段或整个笔记中的字段（如果您使用 dataview 内联字段）。索引完整笔记可能会在包含大文件的库中导致一些延迟

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source:
Javascript string, the "page" (dataview page type) variable is available
example 1: page.file.name
example 2: `${page.file.name} of gender ${page.gender}`
ast.target: Javascript 字符串，\"page\"（dataview 页面类型）变量可用\n示例 1：page.file.name\n示例 2：`${page.file.name} of gender ${page.gender}`

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source:
Javascript instruction, (a: TFile, b: TFile): number
example 1 (alphabetical order): a.basename < b.basename ? 1 : -1 
example 2 (creation time newer to older): b.stat.ctime - b.stat.ctime
ast.target: Javascript 指令，(a: TFile, b: TFile): number\n示例 1（字母顺序）：a.basename < b.basename ? 1 : -1 \n示例 2（创建时间从新到旧）：b.stat.ctime - b.stat.ctime
